title: Pre-trained Models Path
description: Build fluency in Pre-trained Models inside Model Architecture by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: WavLM-Base
steps.summary: WavLM-Base belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Pre-trained Models. Start after WavLM and Base Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
